_comment: Workflow 3 - Handoff Human (Cartorio 2 Notas Uberlandia). Trigger: webhook POST /webhook/handoff-human. Flux: Normalizar payload -> Chatwoot /conversations -> Respond link agente. Se Chatwoot indisponivel, retorna inbox URL como fallback. Owner: cartorio-n8n. Modified by Gustavo Almeida.
name: 03 - Handoff Humano (Chatwoot)

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "status": "handoff",
  "response": "Transferi para um atendente humano. Acesse: {{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.inbox_url }}",
  "chatwoot_status": "{{ $json.statusCode || 'unavailable' }}",
  "sender": "{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.sender }}",
  "message_id": "{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.message_id }}",
  "reason": "{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.reason }}"
}
